debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.n P / Erdos392.Params.L P
hp' : ↑p > √↑(Erdos392.Params.n P)
⊢ Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p ≥ -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
        _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
            convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hprime.pos using 1
            rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (div_le_self _ _)]
        _ ≤ P.n / p + P.M := by have := count_bound_aux P.n P.M p; grind
    have hfact_eq : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p :=
      factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp'
    have hsum_ge : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≥ P.n / p - P.M := by
      have := Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add.mp (Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add'.2 hsum_le)
      exact (Nat.sub_le_iff_le_add'.1 this).trans_eq (Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_add_left _ _)).symm ▸
        Nat.sub_le_sub_left (Nat.le_add_left _ _) _
    have hsum_ge' : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ -P.M := by
      have : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) ≥ (P.n / p : ℤ) - P.M := by
        exact_mod_cast hsum_ge
      simpa [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact_eq, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm,
        add_comm, Int.sub_eq_add_neg, Int.add_assoc] using (by
          have := sub_le_sub_right this (P.n / p : ℤ)
          simpa [Int.sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this)
    simpa [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum] using hsum_ge'
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
